name: Chunky Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken breasts, cooked and cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the soup, mayonnaise, and lemon juice.
2. In a 9" x 13" pan, layer green beans, chicken, water chestnuts, soup mixture, and grated cheese.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes to 1 hour until the mixture bubbles.
Note: Ensure all measurements are in consistent units (e.g., cups or tablespoons) throughout the recipe.
